infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: We need your location to find beauty professionals near you.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: We need access to your camera to upload photos to your profile.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: We need access to your photo library to upload images.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: We need access to your calendar to add booking reminders.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Glamora to use your location to find beauty professionals near you.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Glamora to access your photos to upload images.

plugins.calendarPermission: Allow Glamora to access your calendar to add booking reminders.

plugins.faceIDPermission: Allow Glamora to use Face ID for secure authentication.
